meta.summary: BlobToolKit BlobTools2 command-line runtime for genome assembly QC, BlobDir creation/filtering/validation, and local viewer assets.
meta.description: BlobToolKit BlobTools2 command-line runtime for genome assembly QC, BlobDir creation/filtering/validation, and local viewer assets.

test: blobtools --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'blobtoolkit v4.5.3' >/dev/null && btk --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'blobtoolkit v4.5.3' >/dev/null
blobtools --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'BlobTools2 - assembly exploration' >/dev/null && { btk 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'BlobToolKit - assembly exploration' >/dev/null

blobtools create --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Add data to a BlobDir' >/dev/null && blobtools filter --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Filter a BlobDir' >/dev/null && blobtools validate --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Validate a BlobDir' >/dev/null && blobtools view --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Generate plots using BlobToolKit Viewer' >/dev/null && blobtools host --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Deprecated. Host a collection of BlobDirs' >/dev/null

python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; import blobtools, btk, selenium, pyvirtualdisplay, ujson, yaml; from blobtoolkit_host import host; assert md.version("blobtoolkit") == "4.5.3"; assert md.version("blobtoolkit-host") == "4.5.0"; print(blobtools.__version__)' | grep -Fx 'blobtoolkit v4.5.3' >/dev/null

test -x /usr/local/bin/blobtoolkit-api && test -x /usr/local/bin/blobtoolkit-viewer && test -x "$(command -v firefox)" && geckodriver --version 2>&1 | grep -iF 'geckodriver' >/dev/null && test -x "$(command -v Xvfb)"

upstream.name: BlobToolKit
upstream.citation: Challis et al. 2020, BlobToolKit: Interactive quality assessment of genome assemblies; Challis and Blaxter 2025, Snail plots are badges of genome assembly quality
